objective: Enhance the 12factor doctrine after the operator-model pass by aligning the next refinement wave with the current AgentOps repo contract and the mined operator-kernel knowledge, without flattening 12factor into AgentOps product language.
validation_commands: rg -n 'fitness gradient|provenance|stateful environment|replaceable actors|selection gates|promotion loops|governance' README.md factors docs/explanation docs/principles
rg -n 'three gaps|judgment validation|durable learning|loop closure' README.md factors docs/explanation docs/principles
done_criteria: Factors VII and IX explicitly cover provenance and fitness gradient in 12factor language.
comparison-table, evolution-of-12-factor, and from-theory-to-production reflect the operator model beneath the factor surface.
AgentOps remains a narrower product/reference implementation, not the repo's primary frame.
The change stays limited to the targeted explanatory surfaces with no broad wording sweep.

ranked_packet.summary: Core doctrine is aligned; the remaining gap is in secondary docs plus fitness gradient and provenance.
The strongest mined kernel is context orchestration, distributed cognition, provenance-backed handoff, and planning/validation loops.
Harvest hygiene remains noisy because next-work artifacts are not yet target_repo-aware.
